name: LP - Get OpCo Leads Info for Analysis

content.query:
SELECT
lds.[id] as LeadID
,lds.[EntryDate]
,lds.[srs_id] as SubSourceID
,src.SourceGroup
,srs.SourceCode
,srs.Descr as SubSource
,lds.[dsp_id] as Disposition
,dsp.positive as DispositionPositiveFlag
,lds.[brn_id] as BranchID
,brn.LongName as Branch
,lds.[cst_id] as CustomerID
,cst.City as CustomerCity
,cst.State as CustomerState
,cst.Zip as CustomerZip
,lds.[Productid] as ProductID
,prd.LongDescr as Product
,lds.[slr_id] as SalesRepID
,emp.FirstName +' '+ emp.LastName as SalesRep
,lds.[ApptSet]
,lds.[Verified]
,lds.[Confirmed]
,lds.[Issued]
,lds.[NetIssued]
,lds.[Sat]
,lds.[Sold]
,lds.[GSA]
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_src_SourceCodes] src
on srs.SourceCode = src.SourceCode
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
ON lds.dsp_id = dsp.descr
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_prd_Products] prd
on lds.Productid = prd.Productid
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp
on lds.slr_id = emp.id
WHERE
lds.[EntryDate] >= '2020-01-01'
